arts.ttl: Kyle Walker breaks silence on Man City exit in emotional message to fans and wife Annie
arts.sum: Kyle Walker has opened up for the first time about his move to AC Milan as he paid tribute to his teammates in an emotional message

arts.ttl: Man City defender Walker joins AC Milan on loan
arts.sum: Kyle Walker has left Manchester City and joined AC Milan on an initial six-month loan, with the Serie A club having an option to buy him permanently this summer.

arts.ttl: Man City vs Chelsea postponement latest as Met Office issues Storm Eowyn warning
arts.sum: Manchester City are preparing to host Chelsea in the Premier League on Saturday evening in crucial clash for Pep Guardiola's side

arts.ttl: Chelsea interested in Lyon prospect Enzo Molebe
arts.sum: Chelsea are closely monitoring Lyon prospect Enzo Molebe (17), according to a report this Friday from Le Parisien. The 17-year-old striker is touted as being one of the most promising…

arts.ttl: Man Utd could target Nkunku as Chelsea consider Garnacho offer
arts.sum: Christopher Nkunku has emerged as a potential Manchester United target in this window as Chelsea consider making a move for United forward Alejandro Garnacho.

arts.ttl: How Girona could benefit from Man City’s next January deal
arts.sum: La Liga outfit Girona could find themselves the beneficiaries of an impending purchase on the part of Premier League champions Manchester City. That’s according to transfer insider Fabrizio Romano, who…

arts.ttl: Essential Football pod: Man City vs Chelsea - the big preview
arts.sum: Ron Walker and Pete Smith preview the Saturday Night Football clash between Manchester City and Chelsea in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Report: Graham Potter has just said no to helping Enzo Maresca and taking £39m Chelsea player on loan
arts.sum: Chelsea are still looking to part ways with a number of first team stars in January in an attempt to freshen up the squad for...

arts.ttl: Man Utd face wonderkid HUMILIATION as Arsenal, Man City eye deal
arts.sum: Manchester United are at risk of missing out on long-standing target Sverre Nypan, according to David Ornstein, Fabrizio Romano and Norwegian media. According to Norwegian outlet Adresseavisen and since confirmed by Fabrizio Romano, Nypan is expected to arrive in Manchester shortly to tour the facilities of Man City and to hold talks over a transfer.

arts.ttl: Arsenal face wait over Chelsea decision as Manchester United fixture moved
arts.sum: Confirmation of time and date for Chelsea match will come after Arsenal’s Carabao Cup clash against Newcastle
